ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card */,
  "card_name" TEXT /* Name of the card */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the card (e.g., Common, Rare, Mythic) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the card (e.g., Creature, Instant, Sorcery) */,
  "themes" TEXT /* Themes associated with the card (e.g., Spellslinger Counterspells) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the card image */,
  "mana_cost" TEXT /* Mana cost required to play the card */,
  "power" INTEGER /* Power of the card (for creatures) */,
  "toughness" INTEGER /* Toughness of the card (for creatures) */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Name of the artist who illustrated the card */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the set the card belongs to */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  "parent_theme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent theme for hierarchical organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the card type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the card type */,
  "subtype" TEXT /* Subtypes of the card (e.g., Goblin, Knight) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rarities" (
  "rarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rarity */,
  "rarity_name" TEXT /* Name of the rarity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rarity */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for UI representation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rarity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the card */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Price trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price entry */,
  "market_source" TEXT /* Source of the price data (e.g., eBay, Amazon) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decks" (
  "deck_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deck */,
  "deck_name" TEXT /* Name of the deck */,
  "deck_type" TEXT /* Type of the deck (e.g., Spellslinger, Lifegain) */,
  "deck_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the deck */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate of the deck in tournaments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deck_cards" (
  "deck_card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deck-card entry */,
  "deck_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deck */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the card in the deck */,
  "mainboard" INTEGER /* Indicates if the card is in the mainboard or sideboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deck_card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deck_cards_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deck_cards_deck_id FOREIGN KEY ("deck_id") REFERENCES decks ("deck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deck_played" (
  "deck_played_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deck-played entry */,
  "deck_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deck */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the deck was played */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament where the deck was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deck_played_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deck_played_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deck_played_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deck_played_deck_id FOREIGN KEY ("deck_id") REFERENCES decks ("deck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the vendor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor */,
  "price" REAL /* Sale price of the card */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of cards sold in the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the account */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the account (e.g., player, vendor, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)
